notes: Recorded deed showing bona fide transfer after penalties were incurred.
Official documentation showing government ownership during the relevant period.
Court order signed by a bankruptcy judge.
Declared emergency that prevented inspection or filing.
Records showing R-3 occupancy prior to the filing deadline.
Full demolition signed off before the cycle or a new building permit for the property.
Government or court order sealing or vacating the entire building before the deadline.
Proof that gas piping removal was in progress and projected to finish before the deadline but was delayed by unforeseen circumstances.
Required documentation showing the building had no gas service and no appliance connected on the deadline date.
Permitted gas work in progress for replacement
column4: or major correction plus required evidence.
